objective: Replace one-shot TSV authoring with a finite-view requester simulation that is verifiable before Feishu narrative writes.
guarantees: Shen Li and Pei Ying remain system annotation identities and cannot be used as topic protagonists.
Every final row has one hidden requester persona and an evidence-bound finite work scene.
The request span, action, output names, blockage, motivation, and downstream-use spans must occur exactly in the question.
Known facts must be accounted for as used or deliberately omitted, and the fact ledger is SHA-256 bound.
Unsupported numbers, dates, quotations, dramatic urgency, role-card leakage, and masked same-author collisions fail the scene-card gate.
The field compiler cannot modify the selected B question.
Role consistency must be a direct PASS and has no review override.
OpenAPI and browser writes to B/G/L/N/O require a v2 receipt and exact address, field, and value matches; M-only maintenance is exempt.
